source.name: Lab 2.1: Adding Multiple Slots in the Domain
source.instructions:
To pass this assessment, all of the following must be true (same Codio layout as Level 2 Lab 6.2):

• Check 1: level4/domain/basics.yml exists.
• Check 2: Slots amount, recipient, account_from, and account (Level 3) are present.
• Check 3: utter_ask_amount, utter_ask_recipient, utter_ask_account_from, and utter_ask_account each have a text message.
• Check 4: action_process_transfer is listed under actions:.
• Check 5: action_bank_hours, action_holiday_hours, and action_check_balance_simple are still listed under actions: (do not remove them when adding the transfer action).

Full score: 12/12.
source.guidance: The grader prints Check 1–4 with PASSED or FAILED, then a score band. Fix any failed line in level4/domain/basics.yml.
